name: @openparachute/hub
description: parachute — the local hub for the Parachute ecosystem (discovery, ports, lifecycle, soon OAuth).

scripts.build:depcheck: [ ! -f packages/depcheck/package.json ] || [ -f packages/depcheck/dist/index.js ] || bun run --cwd packages/depcheck build
scripts.build:door-contract: [ ! -f packages/door-contract/package.json ] || [ -f packages/door-contract/dist/index.js ] || bun run --cwd packages/door-contract build
scripts.build:packages: bun run build:depcheck && bun run build:door-contract
scripts.build:spa: cd web/ui && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build
